description: Sector overlay for U.S. upstream, midstream, downstream, offshore, pipeline, drilling, production, environmental, safety, and petroleum operations documentation.

metadata.scope: United States sector overlay controls for Oil and Gas. Intended to be used with us/core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from U.S. federal statutes, regulations, agency guidance, regulator materials, and sector frameworks available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance. State, territorial, tribal, and local obligations may impose additional requirements.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: BSEE offshore safety and environmental enforcement framework
primary_sources.issuer: Bureau of Safety and Environmental Enforcement

primary_sources.name: BOEM offshore leasing and exploration framework
PHMSA pipeline safety regulations
primary_sources.issuer: Pipeline and Hazardous Materials Safety Administration

primary_sources.name: EPA oil and gas environmental compliance materials
FERC oil and natural gas regulation materials

rules.title: Offshore safety, inspection, or BSEE compliance evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for BSEE, offshore safety, well control, incident reporting, inspection, or environmental enforcement evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, federal/state interaction, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: BSEE offshore safety and environmental enforcement framework

rules.title: Pipeline safety, integrity management, or incident-reporting evidence is documented
rules.summary: Checks for PHMSA, pipeline safety, integrity management, operator qualification, emergency response, or incident reporting evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, federal/state interaction, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Offshore lease, exploration, or development authorization evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for BOEM lease, exploration plan, development plan, right-of-way, or offshore authorization evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.

rules.title: Air, methane, spill, or environmental controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for methane, air emissions, SPCC, spill response, wastewater, produced water, or environmental monitoring evidence.
